description: Current problem after fz-rh2.11.7.16: tests/fz2_cli.rs build_executes_map_struct_and_bitstring_fixtures and run_and_interp_execute_map_struct_and_bitstring_fixtures fail on fixtures/utf8_smart_constructor/input.fz. Direct reproduction: fz2 run fixtures/utf8_smart_constructor/input.fz emits 'error[internal/post-resolution-leftover]: quoted surface read failed: invalid any value ref: ExpectedTag { expected: ValueKind(1), found: ValueKind(3) }'. Isolation: 'import Utf8, only: [valid?: 1]' succeeds, while 'alias Utf8, as: U' produces the same surface-read diagnostic. fixtures/defstruct_runtime/input.fz now passes, so the old unresolved Point title was stale. Goal: make compiler2 quoted surface read alias keyword values such as 'as: U' as alias AST values instead of routing them through the import/require arity-filter decoder.
title: Compiler2 quoted surface: read alias as: values
